Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Recovery Of Trust Property; 3) Order Fo
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for (petitioner) Thomas Harlon Cook. Michael Bassi & Richard Shearer for and with Josephine Dagatan. Naznin Challa for (trustee) Wells Fargo.

The Court asked if the parties are still working on settlement. Mr. Bassi stated that there is still further discovery and mediation and that they expect to be finished in the spring. The Court asked if they will be ready for trial at that time. Mr. Bassi stated that he is not sure and that they will need a status hearing. The Petition for Order for Accounting, etc. was continued to April 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
